skills.name: Security Review
skills.description: Performs a structured security review of changed code or a PR diff, looking for common vulnerability classes.

skills.name: Release Notes
skills.description: Generates a release-notes draft from merged PRs / git log between two refs.

skills.name: Code Explain
skills.description: Walks a file or directory and produces a beginner-friendly explanation of what the code does.

skills.name: Test Generator
skills.description: Scaffolds a test file (table-driven where appropriate) for a given function or type.

skills.name: Docs Format
skills.description: Formats a markdown doc to sprout's style (heading levels, code fences, frontmatter).
